examples: The focus of the mandala symbolizes the center of energy.
The dimensions of a mandala are the sphere of your mind.
General the monks have been making this mandala of sand for many days.
Hutomo Mandala Putra, better known as Tommy Suharto, surprised people by holding a press conference after the new IMF deal was announced.
If you can navigate its overly descriptive prose and the excess of metaphors, Catfish and Mandala provides an honest and complex look at a generation and the modern landscape of Vietnam.
